purpose: Research metadata for 30 real products from each of five core labels. This file is not a license grant and is not a runtime hotlink feed.

validation_summary.note: John Elliott, Represent, Acne Studios, and Off-White use brand-owned product pages and storefront image hosts. VETEMENTS is an explicit SSENSE fallback because vetements.com exposes no product catalog and delegates its SHOP links to SSENSE; those 30 rows are labeled retailer_fallback.

rights_policy.note: URLs are recorded for review and provenance only. Obtain written permission or replace each image with a licensed/project-authored derivative before downloading, caching, redistributing, or rendering it in the product. Re-check URLs and terms before use.
